This is ours.

Version 0.4 — still writing our story...
Built with love. Built for us.

places

Every place became better because you were there.

Not because the places were perfect. Because somehow, with you, they became ours.

✈️

Airport

You told me you wouldn't be able to make it until a couple of hours later, and I believed you. Then you showed up anyway and surprised me. I don't think you realize how happy that made me. Looking back now, I smile because I had no idea that the boy who surprised me at the airport would become one of the most important people in my life.

🚗

Dmart Parking Lot

To anyone else, it was just two people sitting in a parked car. To me, it became my favorite memory. Nothing huge happened. We were just talking, sitting close, and existing together. It reminded me that I don't need fancy dates or big plans to be happy. As long as I'm with you, even a parking lot can become my favorite place.

🎬

PVR Cinema

The movies were never the best part. We've been there more than once, and every time I leave realizing I'll remember us more than the film. The second time, the movie was loud, but somehow we were so into our own little world that it barely mattered. Sitting beside you, talking, laughing, and being close — that was the real scene.

🌅

PDEU Bridge

That sunrise will always have a special place in my heart. Not just because the view was beautiful, but because I got to experience it with you. Standing there together while the world was waking up felt peaceful in a way I can't explain. Whenever I think of that bridge, I don't think about the road first. I think about us.

🏡

Your Home

The first time I came over, it wasn't for very long, but even those few minutes became something I smile about. It wasn't the house that mattered. It was the feeling of being close to you. Your home became another place that reminds me of comfort, laughter, and you.

🏡

My Home

You came over, and suddenly a place I'd known my whole life felt different. Warmer. Happier. Like one of my favorite people had become part of one of my favorite places. Every time I think about those moments, I remember how natural it felt to simply have you there.

🏡

Reserved: Our Home

This one isn't written yet. One day, I hope the most beautiful place on this page won't be an airport, a bridge, or a parking lot. I hope it'll simply say: Our Home. And I can't wait to add it.

“Home was never a place.
It slowly became a person.”

soundtrack

If our love had a soundtrack.

Tap a record. Some songs don't just play. They take me back to you.

Tum Ho To

Saiyaara

Some songs remind you of a person. This one reminds me of my future. Every time I hear it, I picture us — the life we're slowly building and the peace I feel when I imagine you beside me.

♡ Hear it with me

Until I Found You

Our third month

This song will forever remind me of our third month. The proposal. The letter. The way you told me to listen while reading it. I don't just hear this song anymore — I relive one of my favorite days with you.

♡ Hear it with me

Tum Se

the gentle one

Every time it starts playing, my mind finds its way back to you. The lyrics feel gentle and comforting, like love when it's with the right person. It's one of those songs that says what my heart feels before I find the words.

♡ Hear it with me

Agar Tum Saath Ho

because with you...

Life won't always be perfect. Some days will be beautiful, some difficult, some confusing. But as long as we're facing them together, I know we'll be okay. I don't want a perfect life. I just want one with you in it.

♡ Hear it with me

Phir Aur Kya Chahiye

the answer is simple

This song asks a simple question: if I have you, what more do I need? And every time I hear it, my answer is the same. Nothing. Having you in my life already feels like more than I ever thought I'd get.

♡ Hear it with me

Some songs end after three minutes.
Ours never stopped playing.

little things

The tiny things you probably don't even notice.

But I notice. And I hope I never stop noticing.

You still read my texts wrong, and it makes me laugh every single time.
You always have five backup plans before I even realize there's a problem.
Your smile when you're teasing me gives me butterflies every time.
You explain things instead of telling me what to do.
You somehow know what's bothering me before I even say it.
You make me feel safe without trying.
You can go from serious to completely unserious in minutes, and I love that.
You make ordinary places feel like memories worth keeping.
I still get excited when your name pops up on my phone.
You became my peace without ever asking to.
You make me want to tell you everything, even the things I normally keep to myself.
You make me believe that we'll figure it out, even when I can't see how yet.
“Love isn't always loud.
Sometimes it is simply noticing.”

tomorrow

I know who I want beside me.

I don't know exactly what our future looks like... but I know who I want standing beside me.

🤍 I promise to always be your biggest supporter, especially on the days when you stop believing in yourself.
🤍 I promise to remind you how proud I am of you, because I never want you to forget how hard you've worked and how far you've come.
🤍 I promise to keep choosing you — not just on the easy days, but on every ordinary and difficult day too.
🤍 I promise to celebrate every little victory with you, because no dream of yours will ever be too small for me to celebrate.
🤍 I promise to be your biggest cheerleader, your safest place, your best friend, your partner, and yes... your sweet little headache too.

When I think about our future, I don't immediately think about big houses or expensive things. I think about coming home. A home that's peaceful. A home full of laughter. A home where, no matter how difficult the day was, we both can't wait to get back because the other person is there.

I can't wait to travel the world with you, get lost in cities we've never seen, take road trips with no destination, and sit beside you in airports, cafés, beaches, mountains, and everywhere in between.

Most of all, I can't wait for the little things: falling asleep beside you after a long day, waking up next to you, and having one whole night where I can simply hold you and know you're right there.

One day...

☐ Watch the sunrise somewhere new.
☐ Go scuba diving together.
☐ Go skydiving and probably scream the whole way down.
☐ Take a random road trip with no destination.
☐ Cook dinner in our own kitchen.
☐ Build our first home together.
☐ Spend a lazy Sunday doing absolutely nothing.
☐ Turn "our home" from a dream into an address.

One day this won't be a dream.
It'll be a memory.

As long as it's with you, I can't wait for tomorrow.

vault

If We Met Again

Some pages are meant to be found slowly.

Hint: our number.

access granted

If We Met Again...

If life gave me another beginning...

If we had different names, different cities, different lives...

If we met ten years earlier or ten years later...

I still think I'd find my way back to you.

I think I'd still notice how calm you are. I think I'd still fall for the way you explain things instead of telling me what to do. I think I'd still wait for your messages. I think I'd still replay your voice notes. I think I'd still choose the Dmart parking lot over a fancy date.

Some things would never change.

I'd still love your smile. I'd still laugh when you read my texts wrong. I'd still believe in you. I'd still be proud of you. I'd still choose you.

Thank you for becoming my peace. Thank you for making ordinary places become my favorite memories. Thank you for turning four months into something that already feels like a whole little universe.

If we met again...

I'd still walk toward you. I'd still start that first conversation. I'd still fall in love with you. I'd still choose this life.

Because my favorite part of this story was never where it happened.

It was always who I lived it with.

And if I had another lifetime...

I'd spend it looking for you all over again.

See you in every lifetime. ❤️

Thank you for finding me.

you found the secret

:)

I knew you would look a little closer.

Thank you for always noticing the tiny things. I love you, Meraki. ❤️
